title: Opec Cuts Demand Growth Forecasts
summary:
Main
In its November report, OPEC announced its fourth consecutive downward revision to global oil demand growth forecasts for 2024 and 2025, with China's slowing economy cited as the main factor. OPEC reduced its 2024 demand growth estimate by 110k b/d to 1.82m b/d and by 100k b/d to 1.54m b/d for 2025. It cut its demand growth forecast for China to 450k b/d in 2024 from 580k b/d in last month's monthly report.
